proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `braf_v600e` equal to 1 have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than cell lines without `braf_v600e`.
Cell lines with `egfr_amplification` equal to 1 have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than cell lines without `egfr_amplification`.
Cell lines with `erbb2_amplification` equal to 1 have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than cell lines without `erbb2_amplification`.
Cell lines with `kras_mutation` equal to 1 have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than cell lines without `kras_mutation`.

analyses.code: Decoded local dataset.parquet and fit ordinary least-squares models for signed dependency-score effects.
analyses.result_summary: OLS/two-group contrast: `braf_v600e=1` mean `dependency_BRAF` was -0.805 versus -0.250 otherwise; beta/effect -0.555.

analyses.code: Decoded local dataset.parquet and fit ordinary least-squares models for signed dependency-score effects.
analyses.result_summary: OLS/two-group contrast: `egfr_amplification=1` mean `dependency_EGFR` was -0.601 versus -0.252 otherwise; beta/effect -0.349.

analyses.code: Decoded local dataset.parquet and fit ordinary least-squares models for signed dependency-score effects.
analyses.result_summary: OLS/two-group contrast: `erbb2_amplification=1` mean `dependency_ERBB2` was -0.686 versus -0.253 otherwise; beta/effect -0.432.

analyses.code: Decoded local dataset.parquet and fit ordinary least-squares models for signed dependency-score effects.
analyses.result_summary: OLS/two-group contrast: `kras_mutation=1` mean `dependency_KRAS` was -0.559 versus -0.252 otherwise; beta/effect -0.307.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `nf1_loss` equal to 1 have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than cell lines without `nf1_loss`.
After accounting for `nf1_loss`, cell lines with `kras_mutation` equal to 1 have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than cell lines without `kras_mutation`.
Cell lines with `cdkn2a_loss` equal to 1 have more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than cell lines without `cdkn2a_loss`.

analyses.code: Decoded local dataset.parquet and fit ordinary least-squares models for signed dependency-score effects.
analyses.result_summary: In an OLS model with `nf1_loss` and `kras_mutation`, `nf1_loss` was associated with more negative `dependency_RIT1` (beta -0.0955).

analyses.code: Decoded local dataset.parquet and fit ordinary least-squares models for signed dependency-score effects.
analyses.result_summary: In the same model, the adjusted `kras_mutation` effect on `dependency_RIT1` was near zero (beta -0.0009) and not significant.

analyses.code: Decoded local dataset.parquet and fit ordinary least-squares models for signed dependency-score effects.
analyses.result_summary: `cdkn2a_loss` did not explain `dependency_TMED10` variation in OLS (beta -0.0005, not significant).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher standardized `rnaseq_SLFN11_log2_tpm` is associated with more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores.
Higher standardized `copy_number_9p21` is associated with more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores.
Cell lines with `myc_amplification` equal to 1 have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than cell lines without `myc_amplification`.

analyses.code: Decoded local dataset.parquet and fit ordinary least-squares models for signed dependency-score effects.
analyses.result_summary: Standardized `rnaseq_SLFN11_log2_tpm` had essentially no association with `dependency_DHX9` (beta +0.00010, not significant).

analyses.code: Decoded local dataset.parquet and fit ordinary least-squares models for signed dependency-score effects.
analyses.result_summary: Standardized `copy_number_9p21` did not show the predicted more-negative `dependency_POLR2A` direction (beta +0.00136, not significant).

analyses.code: Decoded local dataset.parquet and fit ordinary least-squares models for signed dependency-score effects.
analyses.result_summary: `myc_amplification=1` was associated with more negative `dependency_RPL11` after including standardized `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm` (beta -0.110).

proposed_hypotheses.text: In the systematic single-feature search, the strongest `dependency_BRAF` heterogeneity is expected in a molecular subgroup rather than only generic screen covariates.
In the systematic single-feature search, `egfr_amplification=1` is expected to define the strongest more-negative `dependency_EGFR` subgroup.
In the systematic single-feature search, `erbb2_amplification=1` is expected to define the strongest more-negative `dependency_ERBB2` subgroup.
In the systematic single-feature search, `kras_mutation=1` is expected to define the strongest more-negative `dependency_KRAS` subgroup.
In the systematic single-feature search, `nf1_loss=1` is expected to define the strongest more-negative `dependency_RIT1` subgroup.
In the systematic single-feature search, `lineage=colorectal` is expected to define a more-negative `dependency_KIF18A` subgroup.
In the systematic single-feature search, `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` at or above Q75 is expected to define a more-negative `dependency_TMED10` subgroup.
In the systematic single-feature search, `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` at or above Q75 is expected to define a more-negative `dependency_DHX9` subgroup.
In the systematic single-feature search, `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` at or above Q75 is expected to define a more-negative `dependency_POLR2A` subgroup.
In the systematic single-feature search, `myc_amplification=1` is expected to define a more-negative `dependency_RPL11` subgroup.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `lineage` equal to `colorectal` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than non-colorectal cell lines.
Cell lines with `apc_mutation` equal to 1 have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than cell lines without `apc_mutation`.
Cell lines with `wnt_activity_score` at or above Q75 (0.819) have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines with both `lineage=colorectal` and `apc_mutation=1` have substantially more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other cell lines.

analyses.code: Decoded local dataset.parquet and ran large-sample Welch two-group contrasts for subgroup mean dependency differences.
analyses.result_summary: Colorectal lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.720 versus -0.252 outside colorectal.

analyses.code: Decoded local dataset.parquet and ran large-sample Welch two-group contrasts for subgroup mean dependency differences.
analyses.result_summary: `apc_mutation=1` lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.545 versus -0.253 without APC mutation.

analyses.code: Decoded local dataset.parquet and ran large-sample Welch two-group contrasts for subgroup mean dependency differences.
analyses.result_summary: `lineage=colorectal AND apc_mutation=1` lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.943 versus -0.253 outside the subgroup.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `lineage=colorectal`, `apc_mutation=1`, and `wnt_activity_score` at or above Q75 (0.819) have the most negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores, while cell lines lacking any part of this subgroup have weaker dependency.
Cell lines with `lineage=colorectal`, `apc_mutation=1`, and `rnaseq_ASCL2_log2_tpm` at or above Q75 (3.559) also have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines with `lineage=colorectal`, `apc_mutation=1`, and `emt_score` at or below Q25 (-0.544) have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than other cell lines.

Cell lines with `erbb2_amplification=1` and `culture_type=adherent` have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than all other cell lines.
Cell lines with `kras_mutation=1` and `culture_type=adherent` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than all other cell lines.

Cell lines with `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm` at or above Q75 (5.669) and `lineage_subtype=squamous` have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than all other cell lines.
Cell lines with `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` at or above Q75 (0.964) and `lineage_subtype=adenocarcinoma` have more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores than all other cell lines.
Cell lines with `myc_amplification=1` and `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` at or above Q75 (0.964) have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than all other cell lines.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Best-supported `dependency_BRAF` subgroup: `braf_v600e=1`, which has more negative `dependency_BRAF` than `braf_v600e=0`.
Best-supported `dependency_EGFR` subgroup: `egfr_amplification=1`, which has more negative `dependency_EGFR` than `egfr_amplification=0`.
Best-supported `dependency_ERBB2` subgroup: `erbb2_amplification=1`, which has more negative `dependency_ERBB2` than `erbb2_amplification=0`.
Best-supported `dependency_KRAS` subgroup: `kras_mutation=1`, which has more negative `dependency_KRAS` than `kras_mutation=0`.
Best-supported `dependency_RIT1` subgroup: `nf1_loss=1`, with additional concentration in `lineage=brain`, has more negative `dependency_RIT1` than other lines.

Best-supported `dependency_KIF18A` subgroup: `lineage=colorectal`, `apc_mutation=1`, and `wnt_activity_score>=Q75(0.819)`, while lines outside this complete subgroup have much weaker KIF18A dependency.
Best-supported `dependency_TMED10` subgroup: `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=Q75(0.964)`, with modest enrichment in `lineage_subtype=luminal`, has more negative `dependency_TMED10` than other lines.
Best-supported `dependency_DHX9` subgroup: `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm>=Q75(5.669)` and `lineage_subtype=squamous`, which has more negative `dependency_DHX9` than other lines.
Best-supported `dependency_POLR2A` subgroup: `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=Q75(0.964)` and `lineage_subtype=adenocarcinoma`, which has more negative `dependency_POLR2A` than other lines.
Best-supported `dependency_RPL11` subgroup: `myc_amplification=1` and `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=Q75(0.964)`, which has more negative `dependency_RPL11` than other lines.
